hooks.command: PY=python3; "$PY" -c '' >/dev/null 2>&1 || PY=python; command=$("$PY" -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("command",""))'); if echo "$command" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE|db\s+reset'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 2; fi
npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1 && npm run test 2>&1
